name: magnet2torrent
short_description: Convert magnet URIs to torrent files by fetching metadata from the BitTorrent swarm.
long_description: magnet2torrent is a command-line utility that converts magnet URIs and info hashes into standard .torrent files. It uses libtorrent to connect to the BitTorrent swarm and fetch only the metadata (without downloading file content). The tool supports SOCKS5 proxy configuration for privacy/security and automatically augments tracker lists with public trackers to improve connectivity. It can optionally use DHT for peer discovery and provides caching of public tracker lists to reduce network requests.

modules.description: Command-line interface entry point that parses arguments and orchestrates the magnet-to-torrent conversion workflow.
Core functionality for fetching metadata from magnets, managing libtorrent sessions, and generating torrent files.
Configuration management module that loads environment variables from .env files and provides default settings.
Package initialization file that defines the project version.
Unit tests for core module functionality including magnet URI parsing and torrent file generation.
